/about-us.title: My Framer Site
p: We build institutional-grade risk and regulatory infrastructure for India’s asset and wealth management industry.
We believe financial institutions perform best when infrastructure is invisible but intelligent.
Your data is your advantage.Our systems are built with strict security architecture, controlled access, and continuous monitoring to ensure client data remains protected at every level.
tools that strengthen decision-making, operational control, and market intelligence. Technology should amplify leadership.
Financial decisions rely on trusted data. Our platforms prioritize integrity, consistency, and reliability so institutions can operate with complete confidence.
Markets evolve, regulations shift, and technology advances. We relentlessly refine our systems to stay ahead of change and deliver lasting performance.
"To build the core intelligence infrastructure that ensures transparency, trust, and integrity across global financial markets."
Vestima is led by a team of industry experts with deep roots in financial markets, strategic technology development, and corporate operations.

/veridex.title: My Framer Site
p: A comprehensive regulatory intelligence platform designed to transform your compliance function from reactive to proactive. By combining automated data scraping with advanced AI analysis, Veridex ensures you never miss a circular, a deadline, or a strategic shift in regulatory posture.

We reduce 100+ page consultation papers and complex circulars into 3–5 high-impact bullet points. Veridex filters the noise, identifying material changes to your business model, reporting requirements, and operational risk in seconds.
Stakeholder Tagging: Categorizes updates for AIFs, Mutual Funds, or PMS.
Veridex automatically extracts every compliance date hidden within SEBI documents.
Is SEBI currently focused on "Policy Shaping" or "Enforcement"?
Our AI analyzes the sentiment of the latest 1,000+ documents to visualize the current regulatory temperature, helping you anticipate the intensity of future audits and inspections.
Trace the Lineage of Every Rule

Regulations don’t happen in isolation. Veridex automatically threads the "Policy Lifecycle"—connecting a Board Meeting Agenda to its resulting Press Release and the final Circular. See the context, the intent, and the law in one unified timeline.
Veridex is built on a high-performance technical stack designed for reliability and speed.
Automated scrapers run daily via cron jobs to ensure the database is always current.
Powered by GPT-4o-mini for summaries and OpenAI embeddings for semantic search.
1.2GB ChromaDB vector store enables our chatbot to retrieve context from over 39,000 processed documents.
Role-based access control and system-monitored performance ensure institutional-grade stability.
Continuous scraping of SEBI, NSE, BSE, and Ministry circulars.
The largest dedicated repository of Indian regulatory intelligence.
What materially changed this week compared to last week?
What compliance deadlines are approaching, and which are critical?
Which stakeholders (e.g., Mutual Funds, AIFs) face the highest impact right now?
Which regulatory themes are heating up or cooling down?
Is the regulator currently focused on enforcing rules or shaping new policy?
Where is a specific policy in the transition from proposal to law?

/vantage.title: My Framer Site
p: An advanced, web-based Risk Management System (RMS) purpose-built for Indian asset managers. It bridges the visibility gap between the trading desk and the compliance office, turning raw execution data into structured, auditable intelligence.
Vantage operates on a metric-driven logic layer designed to identify market abuse and execution anomalies in real-time.
Automatically identifies collusive patterns, price manipulation, and "Immediate-or-Cancel" (IOC) surges.
Sophisticated A1+D and Shadow P&L combinations detect trades placed ahead of anticipated client orders.
Monitors execution quality and routing patterns to signal potential external collusion or slippage.
Tracks execution delays, cost surges, and broker performance to ensure every trade aligns with investor interests.
We provide the infrastructure; you define the boundaries. Vantage offers a versioned configuration history, ensuring every change is auditable and reversible.
Architect complex surveillance rules using multi-layered AND/OR logic.
Fine-tune detection parameters for illiquid assets, volume, and impacts.
Test rules against live data to ensure your surveillance remains accurate.
Cloud-native for rapid scaling or Secure On-Premise for localized data control.
Full compatibility with .csv, .xlsx, and .json formats; engineered to sync with all major OMS/EMS providers.
Mandatory Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) and granular Role-Based Access Control (RBAC).
Defined permissions for Administrators, Analysts, and Viewers to ensure data silo integrity.
100% versioned configuration history with one-click rollback capabilities for all system changes.

/.title: My Framer Site
p: Vestima builds institutional-grade systems that bring structure to regulation, discipline to risk, and precision to execution.
Veridex transforms circulars, notifications, and policy updates into structured intelligence highlighting implications, timelines, and compliance actions relevant to your operations.

Effective risk management requires visibility across trades, exposures, and limits. Vantage monitors transactions in real time, flags breaches, and provides structured dashboards for compliance, risk teams, and leadership.
